user.title: Select Bestway App Type
user.description: Choose which Bestway app you use to control your spa

gizwits_auth.title: Bestway V01 Login (Gizwits)
gizwits_auth.description: Enter your Bestway Connect or Lay-Z-Spa WiFi app credentials

aws_iot_auth.title: Setup Bestway Spa
aws_iot_auth.description: Choose setup method: Use an existing visitor_id OR scan a QR code to create a new account. Provide ONE option only.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Bestway API
error.unknown_connection_error: Unexpected connector error - check logs for details
error.qr_or_visitor_required: Either provide an existing visitor_id OR scan a QR code. One option is required.
error.invalid_qr_format: Invalid QR code format. QR code must start with 'RW_Share_'.
error.invalid_format: Invalid QR code format. QR code must start with 'RW_Share_'.
error.binding_failed: QR code binding failed. The code may be expired or already used. Generate a fresh QR code from your spa.
error.no_devices_found: No devices found. Please check your spa is powered on and connected.
error.qr_code_required: Either provide an existing visitor_id OR scan a QR code. One option is required.

init.title: Bestway options
init.description: Adjust how the integration represents your spa in Home Assistant.

data_description.bubbles_mode: Some Airjet V02 hot tubs only have on/off bubbles physically, even though the cloud accepts a 3-level value. Pick the option that matches your hardware. Changes apply after the integration reloads.
